plugins.name: refactoring-driven-development
plugins.description: Spec-driven, parity-first refactoring and migration. Autonomous numbered pipeline (rdd-specify-01 → rdd-map-codebase-02 → rdd-specify-03 → rdd-refactor-04 → rdd-improve-05) with Seq-ordered modules, upstream-port gates, and per-module spec/tasks/improve layout. PROGRESS.md is the single source of truth; rdd-status surfaces it.
